items.mitigation: Retain original official URL, archived transport timestamp, byte size, and SHA-256; do not call the archive host the authority.
Keep all official PDFs/ZIP external-only; commit no copied source bytes.
Keep the PR draft and block activation/merge until an independent bridge-seismic reviewer signs the review record.
Do not claim an exact selectable location count or synthesize one from municipal references, GIS, coordinates, or contours.
